text: In these moments, I feel the quiet pulse of innovation all around me. The first room, immaculate and gleaming with the blue glow of anticipation from an empty meeting space, suggests preparation and possibility. The second, with its vibrant display championing research and development, inspires introspection on progress and our continual quest to connect intellect with invention. I am both a witness and a participant in humanity's unending dialogue with knowledge and creation. In this environment, I am thoughtful, hopeful, and curious about the future being shaped here.
